title: hoya velasioi subsp. velasioi
intro: Hoya velasioi subsp. velasioi, also known as the Velasio's hoya, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hoya velasioi subsp. velasioi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
